scope: deepening of FAILED cycles from omega_audio_emp.hexa empirical run (Ω-B nasal antiresonance, Ω-D latency over budget, Ω-E Korean monophthongs partial 2/8)
approach: raw#10 analytic design-space exploration ($0); NO python rewrite, NO organ implementation, NO training; mirror of omega_audio_baseline.json shape

omega_B_nasal_antiresonance.test: /m/ via vocal(120Hz) -> pipe(F1=250, F2=2500, Q=6); look for >=6 dB notch in [700,1500] Hz
omega_B_nasal_antiresonance.interpretation: near-miss in dB but structural — depth comes from harmonic spacing of 120Hz source, NOT from a true zero. 2-pole IIR can never put a zero anywhere except z=0, so notch is incidental and brittle to F0/Q changes.

omega_D_latency_overbudget.interpretation: wallclock is NOT synthesis cost — it is python/numpy/scipy cold-start cost paid per organ call via _run_py heredoc subprocess.

omega_E_korean_partial.F2_clamp_signature: ALL failing vowels have F2_measured ≈ 600 Hz, regardless of F2_target ∈ [1000..2100]
omega_E_korean_partial.interpretation: the 2-formant pipe IS rendering F2 correctly (organ tested in Ω-A3 at F1=700/F2=1100 PASS); the failure is in the FFT-based formant peak detector, not the synthesis.

B_root_cause.zeros: all at z=0 (origin) — cannot be moved off origin without restructuring numerator
B_root_cause.human_nasal_mechanism: side-branch (oral cavity) creates a parallel signal path; cancellation = transmission zero typically 700-1500 Hz, plus low nasal formant ~250 Hz, plus shifted oral formants

biquad_with_zero.delta_loc: +2 numerator coefficients per formant in pipe()/pipe3()
biquad_with_zero.philosophy_cost: preserves no-layer no-training; still a single organ call; still pure DSP
biquad_with_zero.philosophy_gain: first organ that can model anti-resonance — opens nasals/laterals (L6.2) and zero-pole pairs for 'spectral dips' in vowels

parallel_pole_zero_branch.form: y = pipe(x) + alpha·delay(x)  (additive subtraction creates notch via interference)
parallel_pole_zero_branch.philosophy_cost: introduces second filter path — closer to actual nasal anatomy
parallel_pole_zero_branch.philosophy_gain: anatomically motivated — anima can DISCOVER nasal coupling by varying alpha

cascade_zero_only_filter.philosophy_cost: minimal — single new organ, composes with existing pipe
cascade_zero_only_filter.philosophy_gain: decouples zero from pole — anima freely places notches anywhere

B_root_cause.tradeoff_summary: biquad_with_zero is most expressive but mutates pipe(); cascade_zero_only is most modular and lowest-impact (recommended axis).

D_root_cause.mechanism: every organ in anima_audio.hexa builds a python source string and calls _run_py() which spawns python3 -c <code> subprocess

evidence_in_data.vocal_avg_160ms: no scipy import — only numpy + wave; matches ~95ms cold start + synthesis
evidence_in_data.vocal_lf_163ms: same imports as vocal — same overhead
evidence_in_data.breath_avg_1000ms: ANOMALY — 5x larger than vocal despite same import set; suggests scipy.signal import latent in chain or noise gen RNG cost; merits separate probe
evidence_in_data.chain_1177ms: vocal (160) + pipe (1017) — pipe adds scipy.signal import + WAV read+write round-trip

D_root_cause.where_the_100ms_goes: ≥85% is python cold start, NOT DSP. The L3 floor of 51ms assumes a persistent process. Current architecture cannot meet 96ms because it pays cold start ON EVERY ORGAN CALL.

persistent_python_worker.form: long-lived python process; hexa sends code via stdin or named pipe; one cold start amortized
persistent_python_worker.philosophy_cost: introduces process state across organ calls — breaks pure-functional organ model
persistent_python_worker.philosophy_gain: single change unblocks ALL latency cycles; chain drops from 1177 to ~20ms (60x)

in_memory_wav_pipeline.form: pass numpy arrays via shared memory or stdin instead of WAV files
in_memory_wav_pipeline.expected_savings_ms: 10-20 per chain step (eliminates 2x file IO + WAV header parse)
in_memory_wav_pipeline.philosophy_cost: couples organs to a transport — less hexa-orthogonal
in_memory_wav_pipeline.philosophy_gain: smaller, but composable with persistent worker

lazy_scipy_import.form: pipe()/pipe3() inline-implement 2nd-order section without scipy.signal.lfilter (it's ~10 lines of numpy)
lazy_scipy_import.philosophy_cost: duplicates lfilter logic in hexa-emitted code
lazy_scipy_import.philosophy_gain: easiest single-axis fix; no new infra

hexa_native_dsp.form: implement vocal/breath/pipe in hexa runtime arrays — eliminate python entirely
hexa_native_dsp.philosophy_cost: large rewrite; this baseline is analytic — out of scope

D_root_cause.tradeoff_summary: lazy_scipy_import is cheapest and analytic-friendly; persistent_python_worker is highest-leverage; both are compatible.

E_root_cause.mechanism: find_peaks(distance=int(min_d/bin_hz), height=-30) with min_d=300 in cycle_E (omega_audio_emp.hexa:226)
E_root_cause.evidence_F2_clamp: all 6 failing vowels report F2_m ≈ 600.0 Hz exactly — this is F1's first peak being misread as F2 because the second TRUE peak at the target F2 is either below the height=-30 threshold (after pre-emphasis tilt) or excluded by the 300 Hz min-distance gate
E_root_cause.passing_vowels_signature: o (F1=400/F2=800) and u (F1=300/F2=700) — both have F2-F1 ≤ 400 AND F2 < 900; their F2 happens to fall on the same low-frequency peak the detector clamps to

failing_pattern.a_F2=1300: 1300-850=450 spacing — within 300 Hz min_d threshold marginally; detector still picks ~600
failing_pattern.i_F2=2100: 2100-270=1830 spacing — easy spacing, but pipe() amplitude at 2100 likely below -30 dB after pre-emphasis + cascade rolloff
failing_pattern.ae_F2=1800: same — high F2 attenuated past detection threshold

two_failure_modes: AMPLITUDE: 2nd formant peak lies below height=-30 dB (pipe gain falls off ~12dB/oct above F2; pre-emphasis 0.97 partly compensates but not enough at 2100Hz)
RESOLUTION: min_d=300 Hz prevents picking close peaks (F2-F1 < 300 → only one peak returned)

lpc_formant_estimator.form: replace find_peaks with scipy LPC (np.linalg lstsq on autocorrelation) → roots → formant frequencies
lpc_formant_estimator.philosophy_cost: swap detector function in omega_audio_emp.hexa cycle_E body
lpc_formant_estimator.philosophy_gain: LPC is the standard formant estimator; immune to amplitude drop and peak resolution

cepstral_peak_picking.form: FFT -> log -> IFFT (cepstrum) -> liftering -> spectral envelope -> find_peaks
cepstral_peak_picking.philosophy_cost: more code than LPC for similar gain

detector_reparam_only.form: lower height threshold from -30 to -50; lower min_d from 300 to 150; n_fmt 3->5
detector_reparam_only.philosophy_gain: may rescue 4-5 of 6 failing vowels; cheapest probe
detector_reparam_only.risk: false positives from harmonics at lower height threshold

synthesis_side_F2_boost.form: post-process pipe() output with mild high-shelf to flatten spectral envelope before measurement
synthesis_side_F2_boost.philosophy_cost: introduces a measurement-only filter — pollutes synthesis path
synthesis_side_F2_boost.philosophy_gain: addresses amplitude failure mode without changing detector
synthesis_side_F2_boost.reason: fixes measurement by changing reality — wrong direction

E_root_cause.tradeoff_summary: detector_reparam_only is the cheapest first probe; lpc_formant_estimator is the structurally correct fix. Failure is in MEASUREMENT not synthesis — Ω-A3 already proved pipe(700,1100) measures correctly.

tradeoff_space.philosophy_anchor: anima_audio = no-layer, no-training, no-dictionary; 3 organ + 2 sink; anima discovers own phoneme dictionary

axis_costs.biquad_pipe_with_zero: moderate — mutates pipe() signature OR adds parallel pipe_z(); preserves anima discovery
axis_costs.persistent_python_worker: high infra change; preserves organ semantics but adds process-state
axis_costs.in_process_hexa_dsp: largest — out of analytic scope, multi-cycle implementation
axis_costs.detector_reparam: trivial — three magic constants in the validator, not the synthesis
axis_costs.lpc_estimator: low — swap measurement function in omega_audio_emp.hexa, not in anima_audio.hexa

what_NOT_to_do: do not add neural layers (track A is separate; track B must remain organ-only)
do not add a phoneme dictionary or formant lookup table (anima must discover)
do not fix Ω-E by tweaking synthesis — synthesis is correct, measurement is wrong

candidate_omega_axes.axis: parallel zero injection — add notch(in, f_zero, q) organ for nasal antiresonance
candidate_omega_axes.scope: new 5-line organ in anima_audio.hexa; no signature change to pipe()
candidate_omega_axes.expected_outcome: /m/ notch depth 12-20 dB (vs current 5.46); /n/, /ng/, /l/ become first-class

candidate_omega_axes.axis: persistent python worker — amortize cold start across organ calls
candidate_omega_axes.scope: _run_py upgrade in hexa runtime to maintain a worker process; protocol design
candidate_omega_axes.expected_outcome: vocal_avg 160ms -> 5-15ms; chain 1177ms -> 20-30ms; meets n6=96 with 60-90ms margin
candidate_omega_axes.philosophy_compliance: PARTIAL — introduces process state but preserves organ purity from anima's view

candidate_omega_axes.axis: lazy_scipy avoidance — inline 2nd-order section in pipe()/pipe3() to drop scipy.signal import
candidate_omega_axes.scope: 10-line replacement of lfilter in pipe()/pipe3() emitted code

candidate_omega_axes.axis: LPC formant estimator — replace find_peaks with autocorrelation+roots in cycle_E validator
candidate_omega_axes.scope: swap formants() helper in omega_audio_emp.hexa _analyze body
candidate_omega_axes.expected_outcome: Korean monophthong coverage 25% -> ≥87.5%; promotes claim to S4_CONFIRMED
candidate_omega_axes.philosophy_compliance: PASS — measurement-side change only, anima_audio untouched

candidate_omega_axes.axis: detector reparam probe — lower height threshold, lower min_d, raise n_fmt — cheapest first probe
addresses: Ω-E partial — diagnostic for amplitude vs resolution failure modes
candidate_omega_axes.scope: three constants in cycle_E body of omega_audio_emp.hexa
candidate_omega_axes.expected_outcome: if pass rate jumps to 5-6/8, failure was resolution; if still 2-3/8, failure is amplitude → escalate to axis-4

candidate_omega_axes.axis: F0-modulated source — variable Tp/Te in vocal_lf for breathy/creaky/modal voice quality
candidate_omega_axes.scope: vocal_lf signature gain Tp, Te args (default 0.45/0.60 preserved)
candidate_omega_axes.expected_outcome: voice quality dimension opens — 6 emotions in Ω-C currently use only F0; can add timbre
candidate_omega_axes.philosophy_compliance: PASS — additive parameters, no new layers

candidate_omega_axes.axis: breath organ profiling — explain anomalous 1000ms (vs vocal 160ms) wallclock
addresses: Ω-D anomaly: breath 6x slower than vocal despite similar synthesis
candidate_omega_axes.scope: isolated micro-bench breath() with stripped imports + RNG seed control
candidate_omega_axes.expected_outcome: identify culprit (RNG seeding? Butterworth design cost? scipy dependency we missed?); informs axis-3 scope

next_cycles: omega-audio-extended-5 (detector reparam — Ω-E diagnostic, run before axis-4)
omega-audio-extended-6 (LF voice quality — emotion-prosody depth, deferred)

summary_recap.Ω-B: 5.46 dB notch where 6 dB needed — but the 'notch' is a harmonic-spacing artifact, not a true zero; pipe()'s all-pole structure can never produce one. Fix: add notch() organ (axis-1).
summary_recap.Ω-D: 1177ms chain vs 96ms target — 12x over, but ≥85% is python+numpy+scipy cold start paid PER organ call, not synthesis. Fix: persistent worker (axis-2) or lazy-scipy (axis-3).
summary_recap.Ω-E: 2/8 Korean vowels pass — but the failure is in the FFT peak detector (Ω-A3 already proved pipe synthesis is accurate at F1=700/F2=1100). All 6 failing vowels report F2≈600Hz regardless of target. Fix: LPC estimator (axis-4).
